title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 488.315 - Surcharge for juvenile justice preservation fund — contingent expiration
text:
488.315.  Surcharge for juvenile justice preservation fund — contingent expiration. — 1.  In addition to all other costs associated with civil actions, there shall be assessed and collected a surcharge of three dollars and fifty cents in all civil actions filed in the state.  The clerk responsible for collecting court costs in civil cases shall collect and disburse such amounts as provided by sections 488.010 to 488.020.  Such funds shall be payable to the juvenile justice preservation fund under subsection 1 of section 211.435.
  2.  The provisions of this section shall expire if the provisions of subsection 1 of section 211.435 expire*.
(L. 2018 S.B. 793 merged with S.B. 800) 
*Revisor's note:  Section 211.435 was amended by S.B. 53 & 60, 2021, to repeal the expiration date for subsection 1 of section 211.435.
